CreateGatewayLimitRules.ipVersion: IP protocol version, current value is 4
CreateGatewayLimitRules.name: Rule name. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_ /. Must start with a letter, length 1-65
CreateGatewayLimitRules.serviceType: Service type (peerconn, et, csn). peerconn-Peering Connection, et-Express Gateway, csn-Cloud Smart Network
CreateGatewayLimitRules.subServiceType: Sub-service type, required when serviceType="csn". LOCAL-Network instance bandwidth type. PEER_CLOUD-Cross-region cloud interconnection. PEER_EDGE-Cloud-edge interconnection
CreateGatewayLimitRules.peerRegion: Required when subServiceType is PEER_CLOUD or PEER_EDGE. Indicates the peer region, e.g. "bj" for North China-Beijing, "bd" for North China-Baoding
CreateGatewayLimitRules.resourceId: Resource ID, peering connection ID or gateway ID. When subServiceType="LOCAL", resourceId="csnId:vpcId". When subServiceType="PEER_CLOUD", it is the csnId
CreateGatewayLimitRules.cidr: Source CIDR block. The rate limiting rule applies to traffic from this source CIDR
CreateGatewayLimitRules.bandwidth: Bandwidth in Mbps. Upper limit depends on the maximum bandwidth of the specific gateway
